CVE-2021-20286.title: A flaw was found in libnbd 1.7.3. An assertion failure in nbd_unl ...
CVE-2021-20286.summary: A flaw was found in libnbd 1.7.3. An assertion failure in nbd_unlocked_opt_go in ilb/opt.c may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2022-0485.title: A flaw was found in the copying tool `nbdcopy` of libnbd. When pe ...
CVE-2022-0485.summary: A flaw was found in the copying tool `nbdcopy` of libnbd. When performing multi-threaded copies using asynchronous nbd calls, nbdcopy was blindly treating the completion of an asynchronous command as successful, rather than checking the *error parameter. This could result in the silent creation of a corrupted destination image.

CVE-2023-5215.title: A flaw was found in libnbd. A server can reply with a block size  ...
CVE-2023-5215.summary: A flaw was found in libnbd. A server can reply with a block size larger than 2^63 (the NBD spec states the size is a 64-bit unsigned value). This issue could lead to an application crash or other unintended behavior for NBD clients that doesn't treat the return value of the nbd_get_size() function correctly.

CVE-2023-5871.title: A flaw was found in libnbd, due to a malicious Network Block Devi ...
CVE-2023-5871.summary: A flaw was found in libnbd, due to a malicious Network Block Device (NBD), a protocol for accessing Block Devices such as hard disks over a Network. This issue may allow a malicious NBD server to cause a Denial of Service.

CVE-2024-7383.title: A flaw was found in libnbd. The client did not always correctly v ...
CVE-2024-7383.summary: A flaw was found in libnbd. The client did not always correctly verify the NBD server's certificate when using TLS to connect to an NBD server. This issue allows a man-in-the-middle attack on NBD traffic.
